items.label: How to add skills support to your agent

CLAUDE.title: CLAUDE.md
CLAUDE.description: This file provides guidance to Claude Code (claude.ai/code) when working with code in this repository. The project defines an open format for teaching AI agents specialized workflows through SKILL.md files.

client-implementation/adding-skills-supp.title: How to add skills support to your agent
client-implementation/adding-skills-supp.description: A guide for adding Agent Skills support to an AI agent or development tool.

home.title: Overview
home.description: A simple, open format for giving agents new capabilities and expertise.

README.title: Agent Skills Documentation
README.description: This directory contains the source code for the Agent Skills documentation site, which is built using Mintlify.

skill-creation/best-practices.title: Best practices for skill creators
skill-creation/best-practices.description: How to write skills that are well-scoped and calibrated to the task.

skill-creation/evaluating-skills.title: Evaluating skill output quality
skill-creation/evaluating-skills.description: How to test whether your skill produces good outputs using eval-driven iteration.

skill-creation/optimizing-descriptions.title: Optimizing skill descriptions
skill-creation/optimizing-descriptions.description: How to improve your skill's description so it triggers reliably on relevant prompts.

skill-creation/using-scripts.title: Using scripts in skills
skill-creation/using-scripts.description: How to run commands and bundle executable scripts in your skills.

specification.title: Specification
specification.description: The complete format specification for Agent Skills.

what-are-skills.title: What are skills?
what-are-skills.description: Agent Skills are a lightweight, open format for extending AI agent capabilities with specialized knowledge and workflows.
